🏆 Playoffs Bracket

Record the winner of each playoff match. Winners advance automatically to the next round on the public Finals tab. Resetting a match also clears any downstream matches that depended on it.

Backup & Restore

Export a copy of everything (teams, players, fixtures, results, settings, playoffs bracket) as a JSON file. Import replaces your current data with the contents of a previously exported file.
